info.description:
REST API for MotoCare Dashboard motorcycle service booking and management.
Use the Authorize button with this format: Bearer <token>.
info.title: MotoCare Dashboard API

get.description: JWT required. Admin sees all bookings, user sees only their own bookings.

parameters.description: Search customer, phone, vehicle name, or plate
parameters.name: search

post.description: JWT required. User creates a booking for their own account. User-created bookings must be pending.

get.description: JWT required. Admin can view any booking, user can view only their own booking.
Public endpoint to list service categories.

post.description: Admin only. Create a service category.

get.description: Public endpoint to get one service category by ID.

put.description: Admin only. Update a service category.

delete.description: Admin only. Delete a service category.

get.description: JWT required. Admin sees all data, user sees only their own booking statistics.
Public endpoint to list services with pagination, search, filters, and sorting.

post.description: Admin only. Create a motorcycle service.

get.description: Public endpoint to get one service by ID.

put.description: Admin only. Update a motorcycle service.

delete.description: Admin only. Delete a motorcycle service.

put.description: Change own password. Admin may change another user's password by sending user_id.

401.description: token tidak valid atau current_password salah

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token. Use the returned token in Swagger Authorize as Bearer <token>.

get.description: Return authenticated user profile from JWT token.

post.description: Create a new user account. Role is optional and defaults to user.

description.example: Layanan penggantian oli mesin dan oli transmisi.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token. Example: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
